subject: [PATCH v7 5/6] nfsd: count NFSv4 callback operations per netns

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch adds per-netns counters to track NFSv4 callback operations in the Linux kernel's nfsd module. It introduces a new array of percpu counters for callback operations, indexed by RFC 8881 callback opcode, and updates the relevant counter in nfsd4_run_cb(). The patch also removes redundant counters and their associated helpers, improving statistics collection and accuracy.
